test.create_query: CREATE TABLE sort_wide_16 ( k1 UInt64, k2 UInt64, p01 UInt64, p02 UInt64, p03 UInt64, p04 UInt64, p05 UInt64, p06 UInt64, p07 UInt64, p08 UInt64, p09 UInt64, p10 UInt64, p11 UInt64, p12 UInt64, p13 UInt64, p14 UInt64, p15 UInt64, p16 UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO sort_wide_16 SELECT rand64() AS k1, rand64() AS k2, rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64() FROM numbers(500000)
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE sort_wide_64 ( k1 UInt64, k2 UInt64, p01 UInt64, p02 UInt64, p03 UInt64, p04 UInt64, p05 UInt64, p06 UInt64, p07 UInt64, p08 UInt64, p09 UInt64, p10 UInt64, p11 UInt64, p12 UInt64, p13 UInt64, p14 UInt64, p15 UInt64, p16 UInt64, p17 UInt64, p18 UInt64, p19 UInt64, p20 UInt64, p21 UInt64, p22 UInt64, p23 UInt64, p24 UInt64, p25 UInt64, p26 UInt64, p27 UInt64, p28 UInt64, p29 UInt64, p30 UInt64, p31 UInt64, p32 UInt64, p33 UInt64, p34 UInt64, p35 UInt64, p36 UInt64, p37 UInt64, p38 UInt64, p39 UInt64, p40 UInt64, p41 UInt64, p42 UInt64, p43 UInt64, p44 UInt64, p45 UInt64, p46 UInt64, p47 UInt64, p48 UInt64, p49 UInt64, p50 UInt64, p51 UInt64, p52 UInt64, p53 UInt64, p54 UInt64, p55 UInt64, p56 UInt64, p57 UInt64, p58 UInt64, p59 UInt64, p60 UInt64, p61 UInt64, p62 UInt64, p63 UInt64, p64 UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO sort_wide_64 SELECT rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64(), rand64() FROM numbers(800000)
test.query: SELECT * FROM sort_wide_16 ORDER BY k1, k2 FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = {threads}
SELECT * FROM sort_wide_64 ORDER BY k1, k2 FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = {threads}
